title_slide.title: REVISED PLAN
title_slide.subtitle: @ 14th May 2026
title_slide.tagline: ERMAI Programme  •  LWD Technology  •  Log QC  •  BCO M1

strategies.title: ERMAI Log Conditioning – Jurassic
strategies.objective: To expedite PP deliverables for Jurassic study
deliverables: SPE paper / abstract (combined with Jurassic study)
strategies.focus:
Adoption & stakeholder buy-in
Timely delivery of PP documents
Integration with wider Jurassic study
strategies.timeline: 📅  In Progress  —  Target: End of May 2026

strategies.title: LWD and ERMAI Introduction
strategies.objective: Promote application of current technology (LWD & ERMAI RTP) to host authority to improve drilling & Data Acquisition efficiency
plan: Discuss LWD application for Garraf with well team
Prepare detailed LWD vs Wireline comparison (pros, time & cost savings)
Introduce ERMAI: LWD integration with ERMAI RTP (future autonomous operation)
strategies.focus: FOCUS:  Adoption & Stakeholder Buy-in  —  Target: Q2 2026

strategies.title: ERMAI Interpretation (QC)
deliverables: ERMAI log QC output for YZR (clastic & carbonate reservoirs)
plan: ERMAI log QC for YZR — clastic & carbonate reservoirs
Apply QC to reduce redo interpretation time
strategies.emphasis_body: QC applied to YZR logs will reduce redundant reinterpretation cycles, directly improving throughput for the subsurface team.

strategies.title: ERMAI BCO (M1)
strategies.milestone_body: The ERMAI Business Case Outline for M1 marks a key decision gate, defining the value proposition and deployment roadmap for ERMAI technology as part of Petronas's digital transformation.
